title: Consultation on draft guidance on preparing the product monograph in XML format: Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on draft guidance on preparing the product monograph in XML format: Closed consultation

## Current Status: Closed
This consultation ran from August 15, 2023, to November 5, 2023.
The purpose of this consultation was to obtain feedback on the draft guidance document Preparation of Product Monographs in the Extensible Markup Language (XML) Format and the sample XML product monograph.
We appreciate you taking the time to be part of this consultation.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
We sought feedback from:
- drug manufacturers (innovator and generic sectors)
- government and regulatory partners
- other interested stakeholders

## Key questions for discussion
We were looking for whether you:
- agreed with or had concerns about the proposal
- had additional thoughts or concerns about issues about the proposal
Email: xmlpm-pmxml@hc-sc.gc.ca
